g.text: Merge docs, swap, copy layers, special characters.
Border, midlines, clear guides, delete layers.
Tiling, grid arrange, distribute, realign layers.
Layer info, measure gap, rotate, smart crop.
Store and reuse frequently used text labels.
Resize blot bands to uniform width or height.
Add borders via vector, direct, or layer style.
Add protein name and MW labels on both sides.
Add numbered lane labels for gel electrophoresis.
Place MW ladder labels with auto-spacing.
Add positioned text with font, size, and rotation.
